name: DeFi Yield Optimizer
description: Find and optimize DeFi yield farming opportunities: liquidity provision, staking, lending protocols, impermanent loss calculation, cross-chain yield comparison, and risk-adjusted APY analysis.
prompt: Find and optimize DeFi yield farming opportunities: liquidity provision, staking, lending protocols, impermanent loss calculation, cross-chain yield comparison, and risk-adjusted APY analysis using free APIs (DefiLlama, Aave, Compound).
